nasb.text: When he heard that I raised my voice and screamed, he left his garment beside me and fled and went outside.”

esv.text: And as soon as he heard that I lifted up my voice and cried out, he left his garment beside me and fled and got out of the house.”

cnv.text: 他一聽見我高聲呼叫，就把衣服留在我身邊，跑到外面去了。”

ccb.text: 他听见我大声喊叫，就把衣服丢在我这里，逃了出去。”

csbs.text: 他听见我放声呼喊，就把自己的衣服撇弃在我身边，逃到外面去了。”
